blueprint.title: Bath Mat
blueprint.description:
More personalization options for the most private room in one's house. This bath mat is as practical as it is stylish - the anti-slip backing keeps the bath mat firmly in place and reduces the risk of slipping.
.:Material: 100% Memory foam microfiber

.:Binding around the edges

.:Anti-slip backing

.:Note: Pre-constructed item. Size variance: 24" × 17" +/- 0.75"; 34" × 21" +/- 1"

.:Blank product sourced from China
